title: Konquest
description: Town claiming and capturing with diplomatic kingdoms, resident management, player stats & titles, and much more.
body:
## What is Konquest?
Konquest is a plugin built from scratch to offer a new team-based land claiming and control gameplay experience for survival Minecraft. Focused around the concept of teams creating kingdoms, settling towns, claiming land and fighting for control over it all, the plugin offers these main features:
* Create a kingdom with players to settle towns which have a special center structure, called a monument.
* Claim land and purchase upgrades for any number of towns under your control, using an economy plugin of your choice.
* Manage residents in your towns to control who has access to chests and who can edit blocks within town land.
* Conquer enemy kingdoms by destroying their town monuments to capture towns for your own control.
* Defend your kingdom's towns with travel (teleport) commands, building traps and the help of iron golems.
* Capture PvE territories called ruins, which offer economy and experience rewards for victory.
* Increase in-game stats and unlock your own accomplishment titles like Cardinal, General, Cowboy and Jester.
* Climb in-game leaderboards with scores based on towns and land controlled.

## Works with...
* DiscordSRV
* squaremap
* Dynmap
* BlueMap
* PlaceholderAPI
* QuickShop-Hikari
* ChestShop
* LuckPerms
* Vault           
* MySQL
* SQLite
* Language Translations (English, Russian, and Traditional Chinese, Spanish, Turkish, German included)

## Dependencies
You must include the following plugins on your server for Konquest to work:
1. [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)
2. [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)
3. An economy plugin, like [EssentialsX](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/essentialsx.9089/), EconomyPlus, or other Vault-based economy.

## Wiki Link (Highly Recommended)
Further in-depth descriptions of Konquest concepts and features, as well as plugin details for permissions, commands, configuration and plugin setup can be found on the wiki. [Click Here](https://github.com/Rumsfield/konquest-doc/wiki)

## Feature Images
* Easy command tab auto completion

![](https://i.imgur.com/4N7F10u.gif)

* Inventory GUI menus with navigation bars for command help

![](https://i.imgur.com/KsCdLUW.gif)

* Display text-based territory maps with proximity and settlement tips

![](https://i.imgur.com/ZXvK6EZ.gif)

* Settle towns that spawn monument structures in the center

![](https://i.imgur.com/knS2FI8.gif)

* Claim land around towns, with visual particle borders

![](https://i.imgur.com/HBQkPY1.gif)

* Travel to towns and get periodic random loot

![](https://i.imgur.com/IKoQlLD.gif)

* Upgrade towns with currency and population

![](https://i.imgur.com/gWVQpy5.gif)

* Capture towns from enemy kingdoms

![](https://i.imgur.com/nMXouej.gif)

* Display kingdom, town and player info in GUI menus

![](https://i.imgur.com/G29kp95.gif)

* Display player scores, stats and kingdom leaderboards in GUI menus

![](https://i.imgur.com/T0wFeBm.gif)

* Apply chat name prefixes based on stats with a GUI menu

![](https://i.imgur.com/4HfMMVl.gif)

## Discord Support
Join the Discord for info on the latest updates and more direct help. Please feel free to ask questions on Discord and I'll help as soon as I'm able. [Click Here](https://discord.gg/mTgtdrznB9)

## Bug Reports & Suggestions
Please use GitHub's issues tracker for all bug reports and suggestion/feature requests: [Click Here](https://github.com/Rumsfield/konquest-doc/issues)

## Metrics
Konquest uses [bStats](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/Konquest/11980) to send anonymous metrics.
![](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Konquest.svg)
